text: I'm Ann Myrick and today I'm going to show you how to clean a wood floor. First you want
to sweep all the loose dirt off the floor and then you start with a wet mop. And there
are many products, there's home products that you can use and also there are commercial
products. Today we're going to use a two in one product where you can squirt it on the
floor and you take your damp mop and go across the floor. Any areas that have extra dirt
you just put a little pressure and scrub. And you've just cleaned a hard
I'm Ann Myrick and that is how you clean a wood floor.
